Heartbreak.text: The pain you feel today is the strength you feel tomorrow.
Grief is the price we pay for loving.

Healing.text: Healing is not linear; be gentle with yourself.
Small steps forward are still progress.

Self-Love.text: You are worthy of care and tenderness.
Talk to yourself like you would to someone you love.

Reflection.text: Look back only to learn, not to linger.
